help.title: Kevlar-4u Help
help.description: Display complete usage help including feature descriptions, available tools, and FAQs.

sections.overview:
## Overview

Kevlar-4u is a comment section simulator that simulates real audience reactions before content publishing, helping creators identify expression issues, misunderstandings, and spread risks.
sections.tools:
## Available Tools

### 📋 Content Review
- `review_content_wizard` - Multi-dimensional content risk assessment (Recommended)

### 👤 Reviewer Management
- `list_personas` - List existing reviewers
- `create_persona_wizard` - Create new reviewer
- `delete_persona_wizard` - Delete reviewer

### ⚙️ System Configuration
- `configure_wizard` - Configure execution mode
- `get_execution_modes` - View current configuration

### 🌐 Language Settings
- `set_language` - Switch interface language (Chinese/English)
sections.faq:
## FAQs

**Q: How to start reviewing content?**
A: Call the `review_content_wizard` tool and follow the wizard prompts.

**Q: What are reviewers?**
A: Reviewers are AI roles that simulate different audience perspectives, evaluating content from specific angles.

**Q: How to switch languages?**
A: Call the `set_language` tool with 'zh-CN' (Chinese) or 'en-US' (English).

setLanguage.title: Language Settings
setLanguage.description: Switch interface language. Supports Chinese (zh-CN) and English (en-US).

createPersonaWizard.title: Create Reviewer Wizard
createPersonaWizard.description: Create new reviewer through interactive wizard. First call without sessionId, tool guides user through information collection step by step.

prompts.platform: Please select the reviewer's target platform:
prompts.ageRange: Please select the reviewer's age range:
prompts.interests: Please select the reviewer's interests (multiple selection):
prompts.tone: Please select the reviewer's speaking tone:
prompts.authorRelation: Please select the reviewer's relation to the author:
prompts.name: Please name the reviewer (leave empty for auto-generation):
prompts.confirm: Please confirm creating the following reviewer:

deletePersonaWizard.title: Delete Reviewer Wizard
deletePersonaWizard.description: Delete existing reviewer. Tool automatically lists all reviewers for matching.

prompts.select: Please select the reviewer to delete:
prompts.confirm: Please reply with full reviewer name to confirm deletion:

reviewContent.title: Content Review
reviewContent.description: Perform multi-dimensional social semantic risk assessment on user-submitted text content.

reviewContentWizard.title: Content Review Wizard
reviewContentWizard.description: Perform multi-dimensional social semantic risk assessment on user-submitted text content. After initial review, displays results and recommends re-review reviewers.

prompts.content: Please enter the content to review:

messages.selectReviewers: Please select re-review reviewers to use:

configureWizard.title: Configuration Wizard
configureWizard.description: Called when user says 'set/configure/switch mode/change concurrency'. Tool previews configuration changes, writes to config file only after user confirmation.

prompts.confirm: Please confirm the following configuration changes:

getModes.title: View Execution Modes
getModes.description: Query availability and current configuration status of host-assisted fallback, MCP sampling, and direct API execution modes.
